_note: Floor values to prevent display regression. update_tokscale.py ratchets these up whenever SSR returns higher values, and applies them as a minimum when SSR returns lower (proportionally scaling per-(client,model) breakdown).
_recovery_methodology: Server data was eroded between 2026-04-21 and 2026-05-06 by repeated `tokscale submit` calls running on rotated local logs. Estimated loss = (expected total at last active-day count, using pre-clobber peak rate) - (actual). Loss: $3,029 / 3.22B tokens / 28,323 msgs. Floor = current SSR + this estimated loss. Submit has been disabled in auto_tokscale.sh.
